title: Failure to launch? Or a 30-year career detour? A users' manual for supporting second-career scientists in your immunology lab.
abstract: Laboratory science sometimes looks like it's built exclusively for young people, but if you look closely, you'll find another group of scientists waiting to join your lab: those of us who didn't quite launch our careers on a normal trajectory. Welcoming a second-career scientist into your lab takes time and resources, but may just be well worth it. Here's what one second-career scientist wants you to know about supporting second careers in immunology.
